allow: Bash(rm src/pages/Home.jsx src/pages/HomeV2.jsx src/pages/HomeV3.jsx src/pages/HomeV4.jsx src/pages/HomeV5.jsx)

PowerShell($body = '{"amount": 1, "currency": "INR", "receipt": "deployed_backend_test"}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.calycopaints.com/api/payments/create-order" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 30 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; try { $_.ErrorDetails.Message } catch {} })

PowerShell($js = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://calycopaints.com/assets/Checkout-Bf3LxW1L.js" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "CHUNK SIZE: $\($js.Length\)"; $keys = [regex]::Matches\($js, 'rzp_\(test|live\)_[A-Za-z0-9]+'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Sort-Object -Unique; "RAZORPAY KEYS: $\($keys -join ', '\)"; $apis = [regex]::Matches\($js, '"https?://[^"]{5,80}"'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Sort-Object -Unique | Select-Object -First 15; "URLS IN CHUNK:"; $apis)

PowerShell($body = '{"amount": 1, "currency": "INR", "receipt": "deployed_backend_live_test"}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://calyco-api.vercel.app/api/payments/create-order" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 30 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell($body = '{"amount": 1, "currency": "INR", "receipt": "recheck_after_env_change"}'; try { $o = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://calyco-api.vercel.app/api/payments/create-order" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 30; "ORDER CREATED: $\($o.order.id\)"; $pair = "rzp_live_RDuFvuUpRHpLsF:sAGgD4hEoV5NRDkMulfSYOck"; $auth = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\($pair\)\); try { $live = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.razorpay.com/v1/orders/$\($o.order.id\)" -Headers @{Authorization = "Basic $auth"} -TimeoutSec 30; "LIVE MODE CHECK: FOUND IN LIVE MODE - backend is LIVE ✓ \(status: $\($live.status\)\)" } catch { "LIVE MODE CHECK: NOT FOUND - backend is still on TEST keys" } } catch { "BACKEND ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
PowerShell($global = npm root -g; Get-ChildItem "$global" -Filter "playwright" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
